name: Tenyinfinity
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>威</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>窮</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>境</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: You can add 1 "Vessel for the Dragon Cycle" or "Heavenly Dragon Circle" from your Deck to your hand. You can Tribute 1 Wyrm monster, then target 1 monster on the field; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Tenyinfinity" once per turn. Once per turn, during your End Phase: You can send this card to the GY, and if you do, place 1 "Flawless Perfection of the Tenyi" from your Deck or GY, face-up in your Field Zone. You can only activate 1 "Tenyinfinity" per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: You can add 1 "Vessel for the Dragon Cycle" or "Heavenly Dragon Circle" from your Deck to your hand. You can only activate 1 "Tenyinfinity" per turn.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
Places cards from your Deck in your Field Zone
Places cards from your Graveyard in your Field Zone
